plan: Modify Field.__eq__, __lt__, and __hash__ (lines ~516-529 of django/db/models/fields/__init__.py) so equality also requires the same field.model: __eq__ compares creation_counter AND the model the field is attached to (using getattr(self, 'model', None) since unbound fields lack one), and __hash__ hashes the (creation_counter, model app_label/model_name) tuple to match. __lt__ orders primarily by creation_counter and only falls back to comparing models when counters are equal, so existing orderings are not disturbed. This is a single-file fix at the point where the comparison state is defined; no consumers (sets, bisect callers, migrations) need changes.
